RUANG
Dashboard Dashboard Waktu Solat Waktu Solat Al-Quran Al-Quran Duas Duas Hadith Hadith Tasbih Tasbih Tracker Tracker Calendar Calendar Settings Settings

Press [ to toggle

🔥0streak

Duas

Daily supplications from Hisnul Muslim

Dua Before Sleeping

Daily
دعاء النوم
بِاسْمِكَ اللَّهُمَّ أَمُوتُ وَأَحْيَا

Bismika Allahumma amutu wa ahya

In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

Reference: Bukhari 6312

Dua for Patience

Hardship
دعاء الصبر
رَبَّنَا أَفْرِغْ عَلَيْنَا صَبْرًا وَثَبِّتْ أَقْدَامَنَا وَانصُرْنَا عَلَى الْقَوْمِ الْكَافِرِينَ

Rabbana afrigh 'alayna sabran wa thabbit aqdamana wansurna 'alal-qawmil-kafireen

Our Lord, pour upon us patience and plant firmly our feet and give us victory over the disbelieving people.

Reference: Quran 2:250

Dua for Protection

Protection
دعاء الحفظ
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لاَ يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الأَرْضِ وَلاَ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ

Bismillahil-lathee la yadurru ma'asmihi shay'un fil-ardi wa la fis-sama'i wa huwas-samee'ul-'aleem

In the name of Allah with whose name nothing is harmed on earth nor in the heavens and He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

Reference: Abu Dawud 5088

Dua for Knowledge

Knowledge
دعاء العلم
رَبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا

Rabbi zidnee 'ilma

My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

Reference: Quran 20:114

Dua When in Distress

Hardship
دعاء الكرب
لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ رَبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَرَبُّ الأَرْضِ وَرَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ

La ilaha illallahul-'atheemul-haleem, la ilaha illallahu rabbul-'arshil-'atheem, la ilaha illallahu rabbus-samawati wa rabbul-ardi wa rabbul-'arshil-kareem

There is no god but Allah the Mighty, the Forbearing. There is no god but Allah, Lord of the mighty throne. There is no god but Allah, Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth and Lord of the noble throne.

Reference: Bukhari 6346

Dua for a Good End

Daily
دعاء حسن الخاتمة
يَا مُقَلِّبَ الْقُلُوبِ ثَبِّتْ قَلْبِي عَلَى دِينِكَ

Ya Muqallibal-quloob thabbit qalbee 'ala deenik

O Turner of hearts, keep my heart firm upon Your religion.

Reference: Tirmidhi 3522

Dua for Provision

Daily
دعاء الرزق
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا

Allahumma innee as'aluka 'ilman nafi'an, wa rizqan tayyiban, wa 'amalan mutaqabbalan

O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, good provision, and acceptable deeds.

Reference: Ibn Majah 925

Morning Remembrance

Morning & Evening
ذكر الصباح
أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ

Asbahna wa asbahal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah

We have reached the morning and at this very time the whole kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without any partner.

Reference: Muslim 2723

Evening Remembrance

Morning & Evening
ذكر المساء
أَمْسَيْنَا وَأَمْسَى الْمُلْكُ لِلَّهِ، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ، لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ

Amsayna wa amsal-mulku lillah, walhamdu lillah, la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah

We have reached the evening and at this very time the whole kingdom belongs to Allah. All praise is for Allah. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone, without any partner.

Reference: Muslim 2723

Entering the Mosque

Mosque
دعاء دخول المسجد
اللَّهُمَّ افْتَحْ لِي أَبْوَابَ رَحْمَتِكَ

Allahum-maftah lee abwaba rahmatika

O Allah, open the gates of Your mercy for me.

Reference: Muslim 713

Leaving the Mosque

Mosque
دعاء الخروج من المسجد
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ

Allahumma innee as'aluka min fadlika

O Allah, I ask You from Your favour.

Reference: Muslim 713

Dua Upon Waking Up

Daily
دعاء الاستيقاظ
الحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ

Alhamdu lillahil-lathee ahyana ba'da ma amatana wa ilayhin-nushur

All praise is for Allah who gave us life after having taken it from us and unto Him is the resurrection.

Reference: Bukhari 6312

After Adhan

Prayer
دعاء بعد الأذان
اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذِهِ الدَّعْوَةِ التَّامَّةِ، وَالصَّلاَةِ الْقَائِمَةِ، آتِ مُحَمَّدًا الْوَسِيلَةَ وَالْفَضِيلَةَ، وَابْعَثْهُ مَقَامًا مَحْمُودًا الَّذِي وَعَدْتَهُ

Allaahumma Rabba haathid-da'watit-taammah, wassalaatil-qaa'imah, aati Muhammadanil-waseelata walfadeelah, wab'athhu maqaamam mahmoodanil-lathee wa'adtah

O Allah, Lord of this perfect call and established prayer, grant Muhammad the intercession and favour, and raise him to the praised station that You have promised him.

Reference: Bukhari 614

Between Adhan and Iqamah

Prayer
دعاء بين الأذان والإقامة
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ

Allahumma innee as'alukal-'aafiyata fid-dunya wal-aakhirah

O Allah, I ask You for wellbeing in this world and the Hereafter.

Reference: Abu Dawud 5052

Before Wudu (Ablution)

Worship
دعاء قبل الوضوء
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ

Bismillah

In the name of Allah.

Reference: Abu Dawud 101

After Wudu (Ablution)

Worship
دعاء بعد الوضوء
أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ

Ash-hadu an la ilaha illallahu wahdahu la shareeka lah, wa ash-hadu anna Muhammadan 'abduhu wa rasooluhu

I bear witness that none has the right to be worshipped except Allah, alone without partner, and I bear witness that Muhammad is His slave and messenger.

Reference: Muslim 234

Before Entering Toilet

Daily
دعاء دخول الخلاء
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبْثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ

Bismillah, Allahumma innee a'oothu bika minal-khubthi wal-khaba'ith

In the name of Allah. O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the male and female evil jinn.

Reference: Bukhari 142

After Leaving Toilet

Daily
دعاء الخروج من الخلاء
غُفْرَانَكَ

Ghufraanak

I seek Your forgiveness.

Reference: Tirmidhi 7

When It Rains

Nature
دعاء نزول المطر
اللَّهُمَّ صَيِّبًا نَافِعًا

Allahumma sayyiban naafi'aa

O Allah, (let it be) a beneficial rain.

Reference: Bukhari 1032

After Rain

Nature
دعاء بعد المطر
مُطِرْنَا بِفَضْلِ اللَّهِ وَرَحْمَتِهِ

Mutirna bifadlillahi wa rahmatihi

We have been given rain by the grace and mercy of Allah.

Reference: Bukhari 846

When Seeing the New Moon

Nature
دعاء رؤية الهلال
اللَّهُمَّ أَهِلَّهُ عَلَيْنَا بِالْيُمْنِ وَالإِيمَانِ، وَالسَّلاَمَةِ وَالإِسْلاَمِ، رَبِّي وَرَبُّكَ اللَّهُ

Allahumma ahillahu 'alayna bil-yumni wal-eeman, was-salaamati wal-islam, rabbee wa rabbukal-lahu

O Allah, let this moon appear on us with prosperity and faith, with safety and Islam. My Lord and your Lord is Allah.

Reference: Tirmidhi 3454

When Looking in the Mirror

Daily
دعاء النظر في المرآة
اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ حَسَّنْتَ خَلْقِي فَحَسِّنْ خُلُقِي

Allahumma anta hassanta khalqee fahassin khuluqee

O Allah, just as You have made my outward appearance beautiful, make my character beautiful too.

Reference: Ahmad 3823

Dua Before Eating

Food
دعاء قبل الطعام
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ

Bismillah

In the name of Allah.

Reference: Abu Dawud 3767

When Wearing New Clothes

Daily
دعاء لبس الثوب الجديد
اللَّهُمَّ لَكَ الْحَمْدُ أَنْتَ كَسَوْتَنِيهِ، أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِهِ وَخَيْرِ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَشَرِّ مَا صُنِعَ لَهُ

Allahumma lakal-hamdu anta kasawtaneehi, as'aluka min khayrihi wa khayri ma suni'a lah, wa a'oothu bika min sharrihi wa sharri ma suni'a lah

O Allah, all praise is for You. You have clothed me with it. I ask You for its good and the good of what it was made for, and I seek refuge in You from its evil and the evil of what it was made for.

Reference: Tirmidhi 1767

Dua for Good Health

Health
دعاء العافية
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْعَفْوَ وَالْعَافِيَةَ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ

Allahumma innee as'alukal-'afwa wal-'aafiyata fid-dunya wal-aakhirah

O Allah, I ask You for pardon and wellbeing in this world and the Hereafter.

Reference: Ibn Majah 3871

When Visiting the Sick

Health
دعاء زيارة المريض
لاَ بَأْسَ طَهُورٌ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ

La ba'sa, taahoorun in shaa'Allah

No worry, it is a purification, if Allah wills.

Reference: Bukhari 3616

When Feeling Pain

Health
دعاء الألم
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ وَقُدْرَتِهِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ وَأُحَاذِرُ

Bismillah, a'oothu billahi wa qudratihi min sharri ma ajidu wa uhaathir

In the name of Allah. I seek refuge in Allah and His power from the evil of what I feel and worry about.

Reference: Muslim 2202

Dua for Ease in Difficulty

Hardship
دعاء التيسير
اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا

Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla, wa anta taj'alul-hazna itha shi'ta sahla

O Allah, there is no ease other than what You make easy. If You please, You ease sorrow/difficulty.

Reference: Ibn Hibban 2427

Dua for a Good Hereafter

Worship
دعاء حسنة في الآخرة
رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ

Rabbana aatina fid-dunya hasanatan wa fil-aakhirati hasanatan wa qina 'athaaban-naar

Our Lord, give us in this world that which is good and in the Hereafter that which is good, and protect us from the torment of the Fire.

Reference: Quran 2:201

Dua for Beneficial Knowledge

Knowledge
دعاء العلم النافع
اللَّهُمَّ انْفَعْنِي بِمَا عَلَّمْتَنِي، وَعَلِّمْنِي مَا يَنْفَعُنِي، وَزِدْنِي عِلْمًا

Allahum-man-fa'nee bima 'allamtanee, wa 'allimnee ma yanfa'umee, wa zidnee 'ilma

O Allah, benefit me with what You have taught me, teach me what will benefit me, and increase me in knowledge.

Reference: Tirmidhi 3599

Dua Before Studying

Knowledge
دعاء قبل الدراسة
رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِنْ لِسَانِي يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي

Rabbish-rah lee sadree, wa yassir lee amree, wahlul 'uqdatan min lisanee, yafqahoo qawlee

My Lord, expand for me my chest, ease for me my task, and untie the knot from my tongue that they may understand my speech.

Reference: Quran 20:25-28

Dua When Fasting (Before Breaking Fast)

Worship
دعاء الإفطار
ذَهَبَ الظَّمَأُ وَابْتَلَّتِ الْعُرُوقُ وَثَبَتَ الأَجْرُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ

Dhahaba ath-thama'u wabtallatil-'urooqu wa thabatal-ajru in shaa'Allah

The thirst is gone, the veins are moistened, and the reward is confirmed, if Allah wills.

Reference: Abu Dawud 2357

Dua for Steadfastness

Worship
دعاء الثبات
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الثَّبَاتَ فِي الأَمْرِ، وَالْعَزِيمَةَ عَلَى الرُّشْدِ

Allahumma innee as'alukath-thabaata fil-amr, wal-'azeemata 'alar-rushd

O Allah, I ask You for steadfastness in all matters and for determination upon the path of guidance.

Reference: Nasa'i 3160

Dua After Eating

Food
دعاء بعد الطعام
الحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلاَ قُوَّةٍ

Alhamdu lillahil-lathee at'amanee hatha wa razaqaneehi min ghayri hawlin minnee wa la quwwatin

All praise is for Allah who fed me this and provided it for me without any might or power from myself.

Reference: Tirmidhi 3458

Dua for Gratitude

Worship
دعاء الشكر
اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنِّي عَلَى ذِكْرِكَ وَشُكْرِكَ وَحُسْنِ عِبَادَتِكَ

Allahumma a'innee 'ala thikrika wa shukrika wa husni 'ibaadatik

O Allah, help me to remember You, to be grateful to You, and to worship You in an excellent manner.

Reference: Abu Dawud 1522

Dua for Righteous Companions

Family
دعاء الصحبة الصالحة
رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا

Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa thurriyyatina qurrata a'yunin waj'alna lil-muttaqeena imama

Our Lord, grant us from among our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us a leader for the righteous.

Reference: Quran 25:74

Dua for Offspring

Family
دعاء الذرية
رَبِّ هَبْ لِي مِنَ الصَّالِحِينَ

Rabbi hab lee minas-saliheen

My Lord, grant me from among the righteous.

Reference: Quran 37:100

Dua for Repentance

Forgiveness
دعاء التوبة
اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ، وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ، أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ، أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ، وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ

Allahumma anta rabbee la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtanee wa ana 'abduka, wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika mastata'tu, a'oothu bika min sharri ma sana'tu, aboo'u laka bini'matika 'alayya, wa aboo'u bithanbee faghfir lee fa innahu la yaghfiruth-thunooba illa anta

O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You. You created me and I am Your servant. I abide by Your covenant and promise as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have done. I acknowledge Your favour upon me and I acknowledge my sin, so forgive me, for verily none can forgive sins except You.

Reference: Bukhari 6306

Seeking Refuge from Hellfire

Forgiveness
الاستعاذة من النار
رَبَّنَا اصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا

Rabbanas-rif 'anna 'athaaba jahannama inna 'athaabaha kaana gharaama

Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell. Indeed, its punishment is ever-adhering.

Reference: Quran 25:65

Dua for Relief from Debt

Hardship
دعاء قضاء الدين
اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلاَلِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ

Allahum-makfinee bihalaalika 'an haraamika wa aghninee bifadlika 'amman siwaaka

O Allah, suffice me with what You have allowed instead of what You have forbidden, and make me independent of all others besides You by Your grace.

Reference: Tirmidhi 3563

Dua Against Laziness

Protection
دعاء ضد الكسل
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ، وَالْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ، وَعَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ

Allahumma innee a'oothu bika minal-'ajzi wal-kasal, wal-jubni wal-bukhl, wal-hammi wal-hazan, wa 'athaabil-qabr

O Allah, I seek refuge in You from weakness and laziness, cowardice and miserliness, grief and sorrow, and the punishment of the grave.

Reference: Bukhari 6367

Dua for Good Character

Worship
دعاء حسن الخلق
اللَّهُمَّ اهْدِنِي لأَحْسَنِ الأَخْلاَقِ لاَ يَهْدِي لأَحْسَنِهَا إِلاَّ أَنْتَ، وَاصْرِفْ عَنِّي سَيِّئَهَا لاَ يَصْرِفُ عَنِّي سَيِّئَهَا إِلاَّ أَنْتَ

Allahum-mahdinee li-ahsanil-akhlaaqi la yahdee li-ahsaniha illa anta, was-rif 'annee sayyi'aha la yas-rifu 'annee sayyi'aha illa anta

O Allah, guide me to the best of characters, for none can guide to the best of them except You. And turn away from me the worst of characters, for none can turn them away from me except You.

Reference: Muslim 771

Dua for Jannah

Worship
دعاء الجنة
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْجَنَّةَ وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ النَّارِ

Allahumma innee as'alukal-jannata wa a'oothu bika minan-naar

O Allah, I ask You for Paradise and I seek refuge in You from the Fire.

Reference: Abu Dawud 792

Dua After Sinning

Forgiveness
دعاء بعد الذنب
رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَتُبْ عَلَيَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ التَّوَّابُ الْغَفُورُ

Rabbighfir lee wa tub 'alayya innaka antat-tawwaabul-ghafoor

My Lord, forgive me and accept my repentance. Indeed, You are the Acceptor of Repentance, the Forgiving.

Reference: Abu Dawud 1516

Dua When Leaving Home

Travel
دعاء الخروج من المنزل
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ

Bismillahi, tawakkaltu 'alallah, wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa billah

In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.

Reference: Abu Dawud 5095

Dua for a Blessed Family

Family
دعاء الأسرة المباركة
رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِي أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ الَّتِي أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيَّ وَعَلَى وَالِدَيَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَالِحًا تَرْضَاهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِي بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِي عِبَادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ

Rabbi awzi'nee an ashkura ni'matakal-latee an'amta 'alayya wa 'ala walidayya wa an a'mala salihan tardah, wa adkhilnee birahmatika fee 'ibaadikas-saliheen

My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favour which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents, and to do righteous deeds which You approve, and admit me by Your mercy among Your righteous servants.

Reference: Quran 27:19

Dua When Travelling

Travel
دعاء السفر
سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ وَإِنَّا إِلَى رَبِّنَا لَمُنْقَلِبُونَ

Subhanal-lathee sakhkhara lana hatha wa ma kunna lahu muqrineen, wa inna ila rabbina lamunqaliboon

Glory to Him who has subjected this to us, for we could never have done it by ourselves. And surely to our Lord we will return.

Reference: Quran 43:13-14

Dua When Returning from Travel

Travel
دعاء الرجوع من السفر
آيِبُونَ تَائِبُونَ عَابِدُونَ لِرَبِّنَا حَامِدُونَ

Ayiboona, ta'iboona, 'abidoona, lirabbina hamidoon

We return, repenting, worshipping, and praising our Lord.

Reference: Muslim 1345

Dua for Protection from Trials

Protection
دعاء الاستعاذة من الفتن
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ عَذَابِ الْقَبْرِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَسِيحِ الدَّجَّالِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ فِتْنَةِ الْمَحْيَا وَالْمَمَاتِ

Allahumma innee a'oothu bika min 'athaabil-qabr, wa a'oothu bika min fitnatil-maseehid-dajjal, wa a'oothu bika min fitnatil-mahya wal-mamat

O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the punishment of the grave, from the trials of the False Messiah, and from the trials of life and death.

Reference: Bukhari 832

Dua When Angry

Daily
دعاء الغضب
أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ

A'oothu billahi minash-shaytanir-rajeem

I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan.

Reference: Bukhari 6115

Dua When Drinking Milk

Food
دعاء شرب اللبن
اللَّهُمَّ بَارِكْ لَنَا فِيهِ وَزِدْنَا مِنْهُ

Allahumma barik lana feehi wa zidna minhu

O Allah, bless us in it and give us more of it.

Reference: Tirmidhi 3455

Dua Upon Entering Home

Daily
دعاء دخول المنزل
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَلَجْنَا، وَبِسْمِ اللَّهِ خَرَجْنَا، وَعَلَى اللَّهِ رَبِّنَا تَوَكَّلْنَا

Bismillahi walajna, wa bismillahi kharajna, wa 'ala Allahi rabbina tawakkalna

In the name of Allah we enter, in the name of Allah we leave, and upon our Lord we place our trust.

Reference: Abu Dawud 5096

Dua for Guidance (Istikhara)

Guidance
دعاء الاستخارة
اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْتَخِيرُكَ بِعِلْمِكَ، وَأَسْتَقْدِرُكَ بِقُدْرَتِكَ، وَأَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْعَظِيمِ

Allahumma innee astakheeruka bi'ilmika, wa astaqdiruka biqudratika, wa as'aluka min fadlikal-'atheem

O Allah, I seek Your guidance by virtue of Your knowledge, and I seek ability by virtue of Your power, and I ask You of Your great bounty.

Reference: Bukhari 1166

Dua for Parents

Family
دعاء للوالدين
رَبِّ ارْحَمْهُمَا كَمَا رَبَّيَانِي صَغِيرًا

Rabbirhamhuma kama rabbayani sagheera

My Lord, have mercy upon them as they brought me up when I was small.

Reference: Quran 17:24

Dua for Forgiveness

Forgiveness
دعاء المغفرة
رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ الْخَاسِرِينَ

Rabbana zalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakoonanna minal-khasireen

Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers.

Reference: Quran 7:23
Waktu Solat Al-Quran Tasbih Tracker Dashboard
